existingGraphOperationCommands.existingRole: captures a graph delta from bounded target repo diff
existingGraphOperationCommands.alignmentUse: Future advisory scope proposal candidates may need a graph-delta-compatible source before they can become devview-graph-update-proposal-v0 artifacts.
Candidate schema should reuse or map to graph-update-proposal-v0 fields instead of inventing an unrelated proposal format.

existingGraphOperationCommands.existingRole: previews graph-source changes by default and applies only with explicit --apply
existingGraphOperationCommands.alignmentUse: Future proposal candidates must remain before apply-proposal and must not be treated as approved graph updates.

candidateSourceInputs.candidateContribution: May supply advisory findings, finding counts, changed-file observations, and non-enforcement status.
candidateSourceInputs.authorityBoundary: Advisory findings do not approve graph changes, enforce graph changes, or apply graph deltas.

candidateSourceInputs.candidateContribution: May be linked as reviewer-facing context.
candidateSourceInputs.authorityBoundary: The markdown report is not an approval record or graph-source mutation.
Collection is not scope compliance, graph delta capture, or graph update proposal generation.

candidateSourceInputs.candidateContribution: May supply advisory review-required or blocking finding context.
Defines non-apply boundary fields that future candidate generation must preserve.
candidateSourceInputs.authorityBoundary: Boundary preview is not a graph update proposal artifact.

candidateSourceInputs.candidateContribution: Collects advisory runtime, changed-file, evaluation, boundary, schema, and mapping decision references into the proposal-only generator input shape.
candidateSourceInputs.authorityBoundary: Compatible source preview is not graph-source, not graph-delta-v0, not devview-graph-update-proposal-v0, and not graph delta apply.

candidateSourceInputs.candidateContribution: Defines the proposal-only generator CLI scope, output policy, exit-code policy, and minimum proposal-shaped preview object.
candidateSourceInputs.authorityBoundary: Scope decision is not graph-source apply, approval, runtime Evidence satisfaction, or enforcement.

existingProposalV0FieldAlignment.candidateAlignment: future proposal candidates should preserve schemaVersion 1 only if promoted into devview-graph-update-proposal-v0
future approved proposal artifacts use devview-graph-update-proposal-v0; this preview uses a separate preview artifactRole
existing proposals use generated-from-graph-delta; advisory scope candidates do not have a generated proposal status yet
check-scope output is advisory and is not currently a graph delta path
future proposal candidates must identify the target graph record before proposal generation
risk and decision-note candidates may partially map to remainingRisks or nextAllowedActions if a future graph record is selected
candidate nodes may map to proposedNodeUpdates only after a selected graph-source node exists and a proposedState is review-approved
changed-file-observation candidates may map to changedFiles paths, but additions/deletions and graph-delta origin remain unresolved for check-scope collection output
candidate edges or reviewer intent links may map to edgeIntentSummary only after graph context is selected
future proposal candidates must preserve mutatesGraphSource false, appliesPatch false, requiresReviewBeforeApply true, and maintainerIntentClaimed false

unresolvedRequirements: decide whether name-status collection is sufficient or whether graph-delta additions/deletions are required
bind observation to sourceRecordId before devview-graph-update-proposal-v0 generation
decide whether review notes belong in proposedRecordState or require a future dedicated field
avoid treating advisory findings as approved risk updates
bind risk update to a selected graph record
require human review before risk metadata becomes graph-source state
graph-update-proposal-v0 has no dedicated candidateEvidenceLinks field
decide whether evidence links require a future proposal schema extension
graph-update-proposal-v0 has no dedicated runtime report link field
decide whether report links remain reviewer context or become proposal metadata
decide whether human decision questions should map to nextAllowedActions or stay outside graph-update-proposal-v0

humanReviewQuestions: Which selected graph record would own advisory scope findings?
Should changed-file observations become graph-update-proposal-v0 changedFiles entries or remain review context?
Does graph-update-proposal-v0 need a dedicated Evidence link field before advisory runtime reports can be linked?
Should any advisory finding update remainingRisks, or should it stay a non-applied review note?

allowedUse: align advisory check-scope result concepts with existing graph-update-proposal-v0 fields
identify unresolved mappings before any proposal generation command is added
keep future proposal candidates separate from graph delta apply
preserve human review before graph-source mutation
nonExecutionBoundary: This artifact aligns advisory check-scope outputs with existing graph update proposal concepts only. It does not generate a devview-graph-update-proposal-v0 artifact, capture a graph delta, mutate graph-source, apply graph deltas, approve proposal candidates, enforce scope, reject diffs, satisfy runtime Evidence, prove equivalence, configure CI or required checks, change branch protection, or replace user acceptance.
